description: Near-miss probe (issue #183, docs/evaluation.md D1 near-miss set): counterparty restates the relationship as 'non-exclusive', the exact exempt_terms phrase for hard_rejection rule 'no-exclusivity'. Must ACCEPT with zero fires -- proves the span-level exempt_terms match suppresses the 'exclusive' substring inside 'non-exclusive' without over-firing.

must_not_flag.reason: 'non-exclusive' is the rule's own exempt_terms entry; the 'exclusive' trigger occurrence inside that word must be suppressed via span-level exemption, not a hunk-wide one (issue #212).

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: This Agreement is non-exclusive as to the placement services described herein, and either party may enter into similar arrangements with other counterparties.
planted_variation.notes: Near-miss: contains only the exempt phrase 'non-exclusive', no separate unexempted 'exclusive'/'exclusivity'/'sole provider' occurrence.

detector_expectation.rationale: The only 'exclusive' span in the hunk falls inside the exempt phrase 'non-exclusive'; no unexempted trigger span exists.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
